/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsensorpackage__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libsensorpackage__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/sensorpackage__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/sensorpackage/msg/workload_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cnrlab/Desktop/scx_basic/workload/test/src/build/sensorpackage:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libsensorpackage__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
